[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110001110 5
1 000111011 5
2 011110111 7
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 101001111 6
7 000101000 2
